results.title: Harshit Bajpai
highlights:
Senior Manager, Artificial Intelligence at [The Mosaic Company](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mosaiccompany)
...
### Senior Manager, Artificial Intelligence at [The Mosaic Company](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mosaiccompany) (Current)
...
- Direct a portfolio of 15+ AI initiatives across four business verticals — operations (predictive maintenance, computer vision, turnaround maintenance optimization), commercial (commodity and demand forecasting, S&OP optimization), supply chain (network and logistics optimization on $2B+ in costs), and procurement/finance (spend intelligence across $5B+ addressable spend, financial reporting automation) — collectively targeting over $20+M in 2026 value capture with a multi-year roadmap to $75M+
...
- Shaped enterprise AI partner strategy by evaluating 7+ global consulting and technology firms across strategy, PMO, and agentic AI capabilities, and co-led strategic engagements with a major cloud partner to advance R&D innovation and develop agentic solutions for industrial operations.
...
- Co-led the launch of an enterprise AI agent platform, expanding AI access across messaging, web, and productivity tool integrations to enable conversational and task-oriented automation across corporate functions -  Lead a global team of ~10+ data scientists and ML engineers across three countries, establishing governance frameworks, talent development standards, and a scalable operating model for enterprise AI delivery
...
, Data Science at The Mosaic Company
...
- Managed a 14-member cross-functional team (including 5 external partners) to develop a flagship AI-driven commodity price forecasting platform across major fertilizer markets, delivering quarterly model rollouts and presenting predictive insights directly to the Board of Directors and Executive Leadership team
...
- Identified and prioritized a portfolio of 10+ AI/analytics use cases spanning commercial, procurement, operations, and finance functions, applying a structured intake and impact-horizon framework to align technology investments with high-value business outcomes -  Deployed a weekly AI-powered market intelligence tool that synthesized multi-source analyst reports into an interactive brief, accelerating commercial decision support for senior leadership.
...
### Principal Data Scientist at The Mosaic Company
...
-  Led the development of DSIL, our cloud analytics platform. DSIL connects to all our source systems and supports pythonic development and scalable deployments. It unlocked a $50M NPV and accelerated our development velocity by 30% -  Developed acoustics models to identify toxic water holding pond failures through clustering and frequency separation algorithms, which has a net annual impact of $4M and significantly reduced site EHS risk to black swan events -  Developed object detection models to identify dry/wet states in mining sites. The solution was utilized to optimize setpoints of cyclones with a closed-loop control integration and has an annual impact of $2M in reduced costs -  Developed vision detection models to identify defects in conveyor belts, which has annual downtime savings of $4M -  Established governance standards for deployed solutions, team workflow, change management, project lifecycle, and code style for internal and external collaborators. Fostered more clarity and accountability of R&R for our group -  Advised senior leadership teams on AI/ML strategy & roadmap, and mobilized organization-wide support and funding -   Enabled data science democratization; disseminated complex insights to professionals from various backgrounds
...

results.title: Paul Jewell
highlights:
Manager Data Science and Advanced Process Control at [The Mosaic Company](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mosaiccompany)
...
#### Manager Data Science and Advanced Process Control (Current)
...
#### Senior Data Scientist
...
Lead a team of 2 data scientists and additional contract resources to develop and implement AI/ML projects for mining and chemical manufacturing operations. Set AI/ML strategy through coordination with corporate and operations stakeholders. Areas of focus:
...
Support mining and chemical manufacturing operations with advanced analytics tools. Specifically focusing on edge computing, optimization, and computer vision for manufacturing systems. Often act as an analytics translator helping traditional manufacturing and corporate functions understand what emergent analytics tools can, and cannot, do to drive value in their business.
...
Develop process models to allow for the optimization of mine production to chemical manufacturing. Develop more efficient methods of data handling from a custom Carlson mine planning software implementation to a Quantrix data model that feeds the enterprise data system. This involves interfacing with the vendor on creating the data output from the CAD, architecting the intermediate SQL database, and developing the Quantirx calculation engine and final data push. Administer and support the Rapidminer machine learning servers for the development of predictive process models at both mineral and chemical sites. Also developed, and continuing to refine, a custom Java extension to Rapidminer to perform ETL operations on a custom enterprise data federation service. This allows the program to connect to process historian and real time current state data from facilities. Assist in the creation and refinement of long range mine plans for the Florida phosphate district.
...

# Data Scientist (GenAI and Machine Learning)
...
- Get In Touch
- Job Category: Data AI & ML Jobs
- Job Type: Remote
...
Job Category: Data AI & ML Jobs
...
### Responsibilities
...
- Develop and apply machine learning models, including techniques such as decision trees and forecasting, to solve business problems
- Use generative artificial intelligence methods to extract insights from complex document sets, including structured and unstructured text
- Perform data analysis, feature engineering, and model development using Python
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to interpret data, communicate findings, and support decision-making
- Translate domain-specific language and requirements into actionable data science solutions
- Continuously refine models and analytical approaches to improve accuracy and performance
...
### Required experience and skills

highlights:
Data Scientist (AI Data & LLM Specialist) | Wfh
...
# Data Scientist (AI Data & LLM Specialist)
...
Join the core team at Eclipse, where we’re building an AI agent-first marketplace that connects intelligence with real-world tasks, starting with data collection and labeling. We are seeking a Data Scientist to establish the foundation for how our data is labeled, processed, and prepared for consumption by next-generation Large Language Models (LLMs). Your work will be critical in transforming our raw data collections into valuable, AI-ready datasets.
...
- Proven experience as a Data Scientist or Machine Learning Engineer with a focus on data quality and preparation.
- Strong understanding of data labeling methodologies and hands-on experience with data annotation platforms and workflows.
...
- Demonstrated experience preparing datasets for training and fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs), including knowledge of techniques like tokenization, embeddings, and NER.
...
- Proficiency in Python and common data science libraries (e.g., Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, spaCy, Hugging Face).
...
- Experience using APIs/SDKs to automate data annotation and active learning loops.
...
- Responsibilities
...
- Develop Data Labeling Strategies: Design and document a formal data annotation strategy, including clear, scalable, and efficient guidelines for labeling our data. Define and enforce quality metrics, including inter-annotator agreement.
...
- Optimize for LLM Consumption: Research, define, and prototype the optimal data formats, structures, and pre-processing steps required for fine-tuning and training LLMs on our datasets.
...
- Data Quality Analysis: Establish automated processes and metrics to analyze the quality of both raw and labeled data, providing feedback to improve our data collection and labeling workflows.
...
- Collaborate with Engineering: Work closely with the engineering team to guide the implementation of data processing pipelines and ensure the data infrastructure meets the needs of ML applications.
...
- Nice-to-Haves
- Experience with audio data processing and relevant libraries.
- Familiarity with data annotation platforms and tools.
- Knowledge of modern MLOps principles and practices.
- Experience with large language model data curation and Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) pipelines.

results.title: Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
highlights:
Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist | Wfh
...
# Senior Staff Generative AI Scientist
...
The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. This is for an ambitious technologist, with the flexibility and personal drive to succeed in a dynamic environment where they are judged based on their direct impact to business outcomes.
...
- As a Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI within Cotiviti you will be responsible for delivering solutions that help our clients identify payment integrity issues, reduce the cost of healthcare processes, or improve the quality of healthcare outcomes. You will work as part of a team and will be individually responsible for the delivery of value associated with your projects. You will be expected to follow processes and practices that allow your models to be incorporated into our machine learning platform for production execution and monitoring, however, initial exploratory data analysis allows for more flexible experimentation to discover solutions to the business problems presented.
...
- Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Operations, along with product management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques.
...
- Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases.
...
- Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work.
...
- Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA.
...
- Work with production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance.
...
- Participate in other data science teams collaborating with your peers to support their projects.
...
- Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team.
...
- Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform.
...
- Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption.
...
- Qualifications
- PhD or Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI.
- Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases.
...
- 9+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU.
...
- Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP.
- Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets.
...
- Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus.
...
- Passion for collaboration, learn it all mindset and driving value with AI.
...
Date of posting: 1/14/2026

results.title: Davi dos Santos
highlights:
AI Engineer · Production LLM Systems | RAG · Agentic AI · Document Intelligence | Python · AWS · Kubernetes
...
I build production-grade Generative AI systems that survive real constraints: messy data, strict compliance, latency budgets, and high-volume users. I am a Tech Lead and Senior Python/Data Engineer with 20+ years delivering scalable platforms across industries, and in the last years my focus has been end-to-end LLM solutions: retrieval pipelines, evaluation, orchestration, and deployment on cloud-native infrastructure. At Mosaic AI, I lead the development of an AI-powered legal contract analysis platform, applying large language models and advanced NLP to extract structured insights from complex legal documents. The work is not prototype-driven; it is production engineering—architecture, reliability, observability, cost control, and measurable quality. My core strengths sit at the intersection of AI and systems: Production LLM applications: document intelligence, extraction, classification, and workflow automation Data and AI platforms: Kafka streaming, Spark/Airflow pipelines, feature/data reliability, and governance-ready architectures Cloud-native MLOps: Kubernetes, AWS (and multi-cloud delivery with Azure/GCP), CI/CD, monitoring, and performance tuning Technical leadership: cross-functional execution, roadmap ownership, mentoring, and high-quality delivery I am most effective in roles where the goal is clear: turn AI into a dependable product. I enjoy ownership of hard problems—data complexity, evaluation rigor, deployment safety, and making systems maintainable for teams. If you are building production GenAI (not demos) and care about quality, security, and scale, I am open to advisory and collaborations.
...
Lead the development and deployment of innovative software solutions and applications powered by Artificial Intelligence. Utilize a variety of advanced services and platforms, including Azure, AKS, OpenAI, GCP, and OCR, to build and enhance AI capabilities. Design, implement, and monitor private AI solutions tailored to diverse industry needs. Manage and coordinate cross-functional development teams, ensuring seamless project execution and delivery.
...
Mosaic AI Agency is a Software Development company. Mosaic AI Agency is a consulting specialized in the development of software and application solutions based on artificial intelligence. Their mission is to transform data into valuable insights, automate processes, and create innovative solutions that drive efficiency and competitiveness of their clients. They help companies integrate cutting-edge technologies such as machine learning, deep learning, and natural language processing into daily operations. Mosaic AI Agency employs 16 people (+125.0% YoY, +10 people). Headquartered in Florianópolis, Santa Catarina, Brazil, with presence in Ireland and Canada.

results.title: Head of Research | Machine Learning Israel
highlights:
Head of Research | Machine Learning Israel Head of Research | Machine Learning Israel
...
### Mosaic AI
...
# Head of Research
...
Mosaic builds the AI platform that B2B GTM and support teams run on. Our agents, retrieval, and reasoning sit at the core of how customer-facing teams answer questions, resolve cases, and surface insights. The depth and reliability of that AI is the product.
...
We're hiring our Head of Research to own it.
...
We're not asking you to start from a blank page. We have an active research roadmap covering eight thematic areas, from self-improving evaluation infrastructure to agentic RAG to multimodality. We have ML/research talent on the team already. What we need is a leader who can take it the rest of the way.
...
- Own the AI/ML core of the Mosaic platform — retrieval, agents, model routing, evals, and the research that improves all of them.
- Set the research agenda. Decide what we investigate, what we measure, and what we ship.
- Lead the research team directly (with hiring authority) and the AI analyst function indirectly.
- Partner closely with engineering, product, and the CEO to turn research into production capability.
- Define and own the quality bar for our AI outputs.
...
What You Bring
...
- MSc or PhD in Machine Learning, NLP, Computer Science, or a closely related field. This is a hard requirement.
- 5+ years of hands-on industry experience building production AI/ML systems.
- Real production experience with AI agents — designed, built, evaluated, and improved them. Not just experimented.
- Prior experience managing researchers or ML engineers. This is not a first-time management role.
- Independent research mindset — a point of view on what to bet on next, and the judgment to defend it.
- Track record of shipping research into product, not only papers or prototypes.
- Comfortable partnering deeply with engineering and product.
...
Nice to have
...
- Experience with enterprise B2B SaaS or applied research in industry (not only academic).
- Public contributions — papers, talks, open-source, technical writing — that show the way you think.
- Experience with RAG systems, evaluation infrastructure, or multi-agent orchestration at scale.
...
- Tel Aviv (Midtown), hybrid — Mon/Tue/Thu in-office.
- Reports directly to the CEO.
- Title by seniority: Head of Research or Research Team Lead.
